zh.Oxford, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德
zh.Lechlade, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tolderby於1551年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯時，他的父親John Tolderby26歲，母親Lady Alyce Atkin24歲。他至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1630年在他的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。

zh-hans.Oxford, Oxfordshire, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾奧可福德
zh-hans.Lechlade, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Tolderby于1551年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯时，他的父亲John Tolderby26岁，母亲Lady Alyce Atkin24岁。他至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1630年在他的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。

nameMeanings.name: Tolderby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English Holdenby, a habitational name from Holdenby in Northamptonshire, which is named with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan + Old Norse býr ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Tolderby was born in 1551, in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Tolderby, was 26 and his mother, Lady Alyce Atkin, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1630, in his hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tolderby est né en 1551, à Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Tolderby, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Alyce Atkin, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1630, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Tolderby 1551 in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Tolderby 26 und seine Mutter Lady Alyce Atkin 24. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1630 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Tolderby è nato il nel 1551 nel Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Tolderby, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alyce Atkin, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1630, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.Lechlade, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムス
ja.lifeSummary: John Tolderbyが1551年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父John Tolderbyは26歳，母Lady Alyce Atkinは24歳であった。彼は少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1630年に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Tolderby(이)가 1551년 영국 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Tolderby(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alyce Atkin(은)는 24세였다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tolderby nasceu em 1551, em Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tolderby, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alyce Atkin, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1630, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tolderby родился в 1551 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Tolderby было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alyce Atkin, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1630 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Tolderby nació en 1551, en Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Tolderby, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Alyce Atkin, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1630, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
